CREATE TABLE test_table (value String, default_value Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (CAST('3.14' AS String), CAST('0', 'Int32'));
SELECT toInt32OrDefault(value, 10) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, toInt32OrDefault(value, default_value) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '%c%';
SELECT SUM(toInt32OrDefault(value, 0)) AS total FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE default_value = CAST('-1', 'Int32')) AS subquery;
SELECT CASE WHEN toInt32OrDefault(value, 0) >= 0 THEN 'Positive' ELSE 'Negative' END AS sign FROM test_table;
SELECT t1.value, t2.value, toInt32OrDefault(t1.value, t2.default_value) FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.default_value = t2.default_value;
SELECT toInt32OrDefault(value, 5) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE default_value BETWEEN 0 AND 10;
